# pfsense_openvpn_server (Resource)

OpenVPN [server](https://docs.netgate.com/pfsense/en/latest/vpn/openvpn/index.html) instance. Configures an OpenVPN server for site-to-site or remote access VPNs.

Changes are applied immediately by pfSense when the instance is saved.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Remote access OpenVPN server using TLS + user authentication
resource "pfsense_openvpn_server" "remote_access" {
  mode        = "server_tls_user"
  dev_mode    = "tun"
  protocol    = "UDP4"
  interface   = "wan"
  local_port  = "1194"
  description = "Remote access VPN"

  auth_mode = ["Local Database"]

  ca_ref    = "5f3e...caref"
  cert_ref  = "5f3e...certref"
  dh_length = "2048"

  data_ciphers          = ["AES-256-GCM", "AES-128-GCM", "CHACHA20-POLY1305"]
  data_ciphers_fallback = "AES-256-CBC"
  digest                = "SHA256"

  tunnel_network = "10.8.0.0/24"
  topology       = "subnet"

  dns_server_enable = true
  dns_server1       = "10.0.0.1"

  gw_redir        = true
  max_clients     = "50"
  verbosity_level = "3"
}

# Site-to-site OpenVPN server using a shared key
resource "pfsense_openvpn_server" "site_to_site" {
  mode        = "p2p_shared_key"
  dev_mode    = "tun"
  protocol    = "UDP4"
  interface   = "wan"
  local_port  = "1195"
  description = "Site-to-site tunnel"

  shared_key     = file("${path.module}/openvpn_shared.key")
  tunnel_network = "10.9.0.0/30"
  remote_network = "192.168.20.0/24"

  data_ciphers_fallback = "AES-256-CBC"
  digest                = "SHA256"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `dev_mode` (String) Device mode (tun for routed, tap for bridged).
- `interface` (String) Interface (or 'any', 'localhost') on which the OpenVPN server listens.
- `mode` (String) Server mode (p2p_tls, p2p_shared_key, server_tls, server_user, server_tls_user).
- `protocol` (String) Protocol and IP version (e.g. UDP4, TCP4, UDP6, TCP6).

### Optional

- `allow_compression` (String) Compression policy (asym, yes, no).
- `auth_mode` (List of String) Authentication backends (authentication server names) used for user authentication modes.
- `ca_ref` (String) Reference (refid) of the Certificate Authority used to verify clients.
- `cert_depth` (String) Maximum certificate verification depth for client certificates.
- `cert_ref` (String) Reference (refid) of the server certificate.
- `client_to_client` (Boolean) Whether connected clients are allowed to communicate with each other.
- `compression` (String) Compression setting for the tunnel.
- `compression_push` (Boolean) Whether to push the compression setting to clients.
- `connection_limit` (String) Maximum number of connections from a single client at once.
- `create_gw` (String) Which gateway types to create for this instance (both, v4only, v6only).
- `crl_ref` (String) Reference (refid) of the Certificate Revocation List.
- `custom_options` (String) Additional raw OpenVPN configuration options.
- `data_ciphers` (List of String) List of allowed data channel encryption algorithms (negotiable ciphers).
- `data_ciphers_fallback` (String) Fallback data channel cipher for clients that do not support cipher negotiation.
- `description` (String) For administrative reference (not parsed).
- `dh_length` (String) Diffie-Hellman parameter length in bits, or 'none' for ECDH only.
- `digest` (String) Authentication digest algorithm for the data channel.
- `disable` (Boolean) Whether this OpenVPN server instance is disabled.
- `dns_domain` (String) DNS default domain pushed to clients.
- `dns_domain_enable` (Boolean) Whether to push a DNS default domain to clients.
- `dns_server1` (String) First DNS server pushed to clients.
- `dns_server2` (String) Second DNS server pushed to clients.
- `dns_server3` (String) Third DNS server pushed to clients.
- `dns_server4` (String) Fourth DNS server pushed to clients.
- `dns_server_enable` (Boolean) Whether to push DNS servers to clients.
- `duplicate_cn` (Boolean) Whether multiple concurrent connections using the same common name are allowed.
- `dynamic_ip` (Boolean) Whether to allow connected clients to retain their connection when their IP changes.
- `ecdh_curve` (String) ECDH curve name to use for key exchange.
- `gw_redir` (Boolean) Whether to force all client IPv4 traffic through the tunnel (redirect gateway).
- `gw_redir_v6` (Boolean) Whether to force all client IPv6 traffic through the tunnel (redirect gateway).
- `ip_address` (String) Specific virtual IP address on the interface to bind to (optional).
- `local_network` (String) IPv4 local networks (CIDR, comma-separated) pushed to clients as accessible routes.
- `local_network_v6` (String) IPv6 local networks (CIDR, comma-separated) pushed to clients as accessible routes.
- `local_port` (String) Local port on which the OpenVPN server listens.
- `max_clients` (String) Maximum number of concurrently connected clients.
- `ntp_server1` (String) First NTP server pushed to clients.
- `ntp_server2` (String) Second NTP server pushed to clients.
- `ntp_server_enable` (Boolean) Whether to push NTP servers to clients.
- `ocsp_check` (Boolean) Whether to check client certificates against an OCSP responder.
- `ocsp_url` (String) OCSP responder URL used for client certificate checks.
- `pass_tos` (Boolean) Whether to set the TOS IP header value of tunnel packets to match the encapsulated packet.
- `push_block_outside_dns` (Boolean) Whether to push the block-outside-dns option to Windows clients.
- `push_register_dns` (Boolean) Whether to push the register-dns option to Windows clients.
- `remote_cert_tls` (Boolean) Whether to require clients to present a certificate with server extended key usage.
- `remote_network` (String) IPv4 remote networks (CIDR, comma-separated) reachable behind clients.
- `remote_network_v6` (String) IPv6 remote networks (CIDR, comma-separated) reachable behind clients.
- `shared_key` (String, Sensitive) Pre-shared key used for shared-key (p2p_shared_key) mode.
- `strict_user_cn` (Boolean) Whether to enforce that the certificate CN matches the authenticated username.
- `tls` (String) TLS key (tls-auth/tls-crypt) used to secure the control channel.
- `tls_auth_keydir` (String) TLS key direction (0, 1, or omitted for bidirectional).
- `tls_type` (String) TLS key usage mode (auth for tls-auth, crypt for tls-crypt).
- `topology` (String) Tunnel network topology (subnet or net30).
- `tunnel_network` (String) IPv4 tunnel network (CIDR) used to assign virtual addresses to clients.
- `tunnel_network_v6` (String) IPv6 tunnel network (CIDR) used to assign virtual addresses to clients.
- `username_as_common_name` (Boolean) Whether to use the authenticated username instead of the certificate common name.
- `verbosity_level` (String) OpenVPN log verbosity level.

### Read-Only

- `vpn_id` (String) Unique numeric identifier (vpnid) pfSense assigns to this OpenVPN server instance.
